title: helianthemum variabile var. calycinum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. calycinum, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. It is commonly found in dry areas, and its roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant has been known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and its health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum variabile var. calycinum include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
